title: How to find the 2nd (or Nth) largest or smallest value
task: Return the Nth biggest or smallest number in a range, e.g. the runner-up, not just the max.

excel.note: 2nd largest. Use SMALL(range,2) for 2nd smallest; change 2 to N.

explanation: LARGE(range, k) returns the k-th largest value; SMALL(range, k) the k-th smallest. MAX is just LARGE(range,1). Among 10/50/20/40/30 the 2nd largest is 40.
